pi_items.source: Task description strictly requires sending a TAB keystroke after scanning, and the verifier script confirms this matches the expected INI key SendKeysPostfix.
Task description strictly requires duplicate scans to be prevented for 3 seconds, aligning with the expected BcGracePeriod INI value.
Task description strictly requires the acoustic beep to be disabled, which aligns with the expected Beep INI value.
Setup and export scripts explicitly write and read the bcWebCam.ini file at this path.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically seeded bcWebCam configuration. All configuration targets (SendKeysPostfix='{TAB}', BcGracePeriod='3', and Beep='False') perfectly match the task instructions for the grocery checkout POS scenario and are correctly evaluated by the verifier logic. The configuration file is confirmed to be located at C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Local\bcWebCam\bcWebCam.ini by the environment setup scripts.
